Workforce Management

Working smarter,
together.

How the Netherlands is transforming the way we plan, pay, and support our people — from manual corrections to real-time insight.

👆 Click to explore examples

Why we started Our approach Impact Is it working? What's next Ask a question

The starting point

Why did we start?

Employees were not paid correctly or on time

Too many manual corrections were required

Managers lacked reliable steering information

Employee & customer satisfaction at risk

Margin improvement needed

How we did it

What was the approach?

👥People centric

  • Benefits for employees: insight & holidays
  • Advantages for site management
  • Transparency on the number of complaints

⚙️A process, not just a system

  • From work to wage — not only T&A
  • Automation of salary payments & journal entries
  • Capturing the right information at the source

🏛️Stakeholder management

  • CLT driven project
  • Work council involved from the start
  • Unions informed before the start

Results

Is it working?

Initial feedback & challenges

💬

Site managers didn't see the benefit

💬

I always have the same schedule

💬

It is much more work

💬

The system doesn't work

It IS working.

The numbers speak for themselves. Despite initial resistance, WFM is delivering real results across planning accuracy, cost reduction and employee satisfaction.

MyRostar
ISS Workforce Management

The app for our people

Meet MyRostar

An intuitive app that puts the power of workforce management in the hands of our site managers and placemakers — anytime, anywhere.

For placemakers

Your schedule, always in your pocket

Our placemakers use MyRostar to stay on top of their workday with ease.

✓
View your personal roster at a glance
✓
Clock in and out directly from your phone
✓
Submit leave requests in seconds
✓
View your worked hours transparently

Full roster overview

Complete visibility for site managers

Site managers get a clear, real-time view of their team's schedules — across locations, shifts and dates.

✓
View individual and group rosters side by side
✓
See schedule changes in real time
✓
Stay informed on absences and substitutions

For site managers

Approve hours in one tap

Review and approve worked hours directly from your phone — fast, simple and accurate.

✓
Review worked hours per employee per day
✓
Flag discrepancies or unknowns directly
✓
Approve with a single tap — no paperwork
✓
Feeds directly into payroll processing

Hours Management Dashboards
ISS Workforce Management

Data & insights

Real-time dashboards

Our Hours Management dashboards give site managers and planners direct insight into authorised vs. worked hours, employee contracts, and planning accuracy — all in one place.

Overview

Hours Management Dashboard

A complete overview of authorised hours vs. worked hours across all service towers. Filter by year, service tower and RostarCAS phase to drill down into the data that matters.

Authorised vs Worked hours

Authorised vs Worked Hours

A detailed breakdown per location showing authorised hours, worked hours (EP & UZK), totals and the variance — split across correction, planning and roster phases.

Employee contracts

Employee Contract vs Rostered Hours

Compares employee contract hours with RostarCAS hours per account. Highlights discrepancies and provides full transparency on hours above and below contract.

Analysis

Hours Analysis — Correction Phase

Employee-level analysis showing worked hours registered in AFAS vs. hours worked in RostarCAS per account. Highlights deltas so discrepancies can be addressed quickly.

KPI overview

Hours KPI Overview

A KPI overview per account showing planning and correction phase performance — including hours under/above contract, authorisation status and UZK percentage — with clear traffic light indicators.

ISS Facility Services  ·  Hours Management Dashboards  ·  2026
Start of the Day
ISS Workforce Management

Daily insight for managers

Start of the day

A quick, at-a-glance overview designed for site managers — giving them instant insight into hours, planning and authorisation before the working day begins.

Mobile first

Ready before you walk in

The Start of the Day dashboard is optimised for mobile — giving every site manager a personalised overview the moment they open the app. No logins, no searching.

✓
Personal greeting and live data timestamp
✓
Quick access to Catering and Hours modules
✓
Updated every night so you start fresh every day

Hours at a glance

Planning vs authorisation, per account

Site managers can immediately see total hours, planned vs authorised hours and the delta per account — for the current or upcoming week. Red figures signal where action is needed.

✓
Total hours, EP hours and UZK hours at a glance
✓
Authorisation vs planning delta per account
✓
Switch between current week and next week
